entity: Karl Malone career regular-season total points = 36,928 (BBR). Warehouse SUM(avg_pts*gp) undercounts at 36,058 (delta 870, ~2.4%)

query_target.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(avg_pts * gp)) AS career_pts FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 252 AND season_type = 'Regular'

notes: REGRESSION: warehouse sums to 36,058 PTS but BBR's official Karl Malone career regular-season total is 36,928. The 870-point gap (over 19 seasons) is consistent with agg_player_season being missing or incomplete for one or more Malone seasons; same general cause as the existing stockton_career_ast and wilt_career_trb regressions but documents a specific new data point. Flip to stable when the warehouse value equals 36,928. FIXED 2026-07 by the curated-layer rebuild (data/audit/rebuild_curated_layer.sql) + fact_game-based playoff derivation; flipped regression -> stable.
